needToPay.question: Do I need to pay to use SocialCaution?
needToPay.answer: No! SocialCaution has a Basic (Free) plan that includes everything you need to get started. You can browse 200+ services, take 3 privacy assessments per month, see privacy risk scores, use privacy tools, and export 1 PDF report per month - all for free. All your data stays on your device. The Standard ($2.99/month) plan removes the limits and adds detailed analysis, unlimited assessments, unlimited exports, and email support.

difference.question: What's the difference between Basic and Standard plans?
difference.answer: Basic (Free): Everything you need to start protecting your privacy. Includes 3 assessments per month, track up to 5 services, basic 4-factor privacy analysis, privacy tools, and 1 PDF export per month. All free, all stored on your device. Standard ($2.99/month): Everything in Basic, plus unlimited assessments, detailed 8-factor analysis, unlimited service tracking, unlimited exports (PDF/Excel/CSV/JSON), privacy history tracking, data export option, and email support. All for $2.99/month.

cancel.question: Can I cancel anytime?
cancel.answer: Yes! You can cancel your subscription anytime. Your data will stay on your device, and you'll still have access to all the free features.

support.question: How does email support work?
support.answer: If you have questions or need help, just send us an email. We'll do our best to respond quickly, especially for security issues. There's no dedicated support team - it's just us responding to emails, so response times may vary.

catalog.question: How is the service catalog updated?
catalog.answer: Our service catalog includes privacy information for 200+ services. We regularly update it with the latest privacy information we can find from public sources like privacy policies, news reports, and data breach databases. It's not actively managed by experts in real-time - it's curated data that we update when we find new information.
